narrative:
Goshen Township has 2,065 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
